assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 16-19 show: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205' — the plan explicitly checks out TC-9005 (the feature branch) before creating the task branch, not main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 27-28 show: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" --body "..."' — explicitly uses --base TC-9005. Line 31 also states: 'The `--base TC-9005` flag is critical because the Target Branch is a feature branch, not `main`.'

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 18 shows: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' — the task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID), distinct from the feature branch TC-9005. Line 21 confirms: 'This creates the task branch `TC-9205` based off the feature branch `TC-9005`.'

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 47-51 (Pre-Implementation Verification) explicitly list all three files: 'Verify `entity/src/advisory.rs` does not reference the `status` column', 'Review `migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs` to understand the migration pattern (sibling analysis)', and 'Check `migration/src/lib.rs` to understand the migration registration pattern'. Additionally, conventions.md shows detailed analysis of all three files under 'Migration Conventions (from sibling: `m0001_initial/mod.rs`)', 'Entity Conventions (from `entity/src/advisory.rs`)', confirming code was inspected.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md line 65 states: 'With the trailer: `--trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code"`'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 56-63 show the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat' and scope 'migration'), and the footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md lines 9-11 explicitly state: '### Target Branch' followed by 'The task specifies **Target Branch: TC-9005**. This is a feature branch (not `main`), meaning the work is part of a larger feature (TC-9005) being developed on a dedicated branch.'
